parameters.query:
SELECT
  mt.id,
  mt.doc_no,
  mt.transaction_date::text AS date,
  mc.name AS category_name,
  mc.id AS category_id,
  COALESCE(mt.beneficiary, 'Sin beneficiario') AS entity_name,
  mt.amount,
  mt.currency,
  mt.status,
  COALESCE(pm.name, 'Sin método') AS payment_method,
  mt.description AS notes
FROM miscellaneous_transactions mt
JOIN miscellaneous_categories mc ON mc.id = mt.category_id
  AND mc.category_type = 'expense'
LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON pm.id = mt.payment_method_id
WHERE mt.transaction_date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ($3::integer IS NULL OR mt.category_id = $3::integer)
  AND ($4::varchar IS NULL OR mt.currency = $4::varchar)
ORDER BY mt.transaction_date DESC

SELECT
  i.id,
  i.doc_no,
  i.created_at::date::text AS date,
  u.id::text AS supplier_id,
  u.name AS supplier_name,
  u.rut AS supplier_rut,
  i.total,
  i.paid_amount,
  (i.total - i.paid_amount) AS pending_amount,
  i.currency,
  i.payment_state,
  i.status AS invoice_status,
  i.due_date::text AS due_date,
  i.notes,
  (
    SELECT sc.name
    FROM invoice_items ii
    JOIN service_catalog sc ON sc.id = ii.service_id
    WHERE ii.invoice_id = i.id
    ORDER BY ii.total DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS top_service
FROM invoices i
JOIN users u ON u.id = i.user_id
WHERE i.is_sales = false
  AND i.status != 'cancel'
  AND i.created_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ($3::uuid IS NULL OR i.user_id = $3::uuid)
  AND ($4::varchar IS NULL OR i.currency = $4::varchar)
ORDER BY i.created_at DESC
